rationale: Educ. Code §38.010 governs school district referrals to outside counselors and is wholly unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 38.010. OUTSIDE COUNSELORS. (a) A school district or school district employee may not refer a student to an outside counselor for care or treatment of a chemical dependency or an emotional or psychological condition unless the district:
_note: Rule text pertains to student counseling referrals; no overlap with proposed homestead exemption increase.
